summary: The diff successfully implements all three requirements: removing the logo image from the header, adding WhatsApp booking functionality with phone number +91 9119960204 across multiple sections, and updating contact phone numbers throughout the application. The implementation is comprehensive and includes WhatsApp links, booking buttons, and consistent phone number formatting.

hallucinated_features.description: Updated email address to Avsarvatika@gmail.com in brand constants
hallucinated_features.reason: The BuildRequest only mentions updating phone numbers and WhatsApp functionality. Changing the email address was not requested.

hallucinated_features.description: Updated venue address to '123 Celebration Avenue, Your City, ST 12345' in brand constants
hallucinated_features.reason: The BuildRequest does not request any changes to the venue address. Only phone number and logo changes were specified.

hallucinated_features.description: Added WhatsApp constant field to brand constants
hallucinated_features.reason: While adding WhatsApp functionality was requested, creating a separate 'whatsapp' field in constants (in addition to phone field) was not explicitly specified in the requirements.
